name: mongodb
description: Official Gemini extension for MongoDB (MCP Server + Skills). Connect to databases, explore data, manage collections, optimize queries, generate reliable code, implement best practices, develop advanced features, and more.

settings.name: MongoDB Connection String (optional)
settings.description: The connection string for your MongoDB database (e.g. mongodb+srv://...)

settings.name: MongoDB API Client ID (optional)
settings.description: The API Client ID for MongoDB Atlas Admin API.

settings.name: MongoDB API Client Secret (optional)
settings.description: The API Client Secret for MongoDB Atlas Admin API.
